description_for_human: Get a brutally honest brand analysis scored across Strategy, Creativity, Narrative, and Digital using ARTO's real methodology.
description_for_model: Evaluates a brand across 4 pillars (Strategy, Creativity, Narrative, Digital) using ARTO Studio AI's proprietary methodology built from 15+ years of brand strategy work. Returns scores 1-10 per pillar, detailed roasts, an overall weighted score, a verdict, and actionable improvements. Use this when a user wants feedback on their brand positioning, identity, narrative, or digital presence.
